languages.text: Ментальный визг огромной твари, засевшей в глубине Заркова. Пробуждает ярость и туманит разум.
The mental shriek of the immense creature entrenched within Zarkov's depths. It awakens fury and clouds the mind.
languages.original_text: Ментальный визг огромной твари, засевшей в глубине Заркова. Пробуждает ярость и туманит разум.

traits.locale_text: The mental shriek of the immense creature entrenched within Zarkov's depths. It awakens fury and clouds the mind.
The mental shriek of a gargantuan beast, nestled deep within Zarkov. It stirs anger and hazes the mind.
The mental shriek of the immense creature entrenched within Zarkov's depths. It awakens fury and clouds the mind.

The mental shriek of the immense creature entrenched within Zarkov's depths. It awakens fury and clouds the mind.

languages.text: 在扎尔科夫深处盘踞的庞大生物发出的精神尖啸。它会激起狂怒，蒙蔽心智。
languages.original_text: The mental shriek of the immense creature entrenched within Zarkov's depths. It awakens fury and clouds the mind.

traits.locale_text: 在扎尔科夫深处盘踞的庞大生物发出的精神尖啸。它会激起狂怒，蒙蔽心智。

languages.text: Zarkov'un derinliklerine yerleşmiş devasa yaratığın zihinsel çığlığı. Öfke uyandırır, zihni bulandırır.
languages.original_text: The mental shriek of the immense creature entrenched within Zarkov's depths. It awakens fury and clouds the mind.

traits.locale_text: Zarkov'un derinliklerine yerleşmiş devasa yaratığın zihinsel çığlığı. Öfke uyandırır, zihni bulandırır.

languages.text: Le cri psychique de l'énorme créature qui se terre dans les profondeurs de Zarkov. Il provoque la furie et embrume l'esprit.
languages.original_text: The mental shriek of the immense creature entrenched within Zarkov's depths. It awakens fury and clouds the mind.

traits.locale_text: Le cri psychique de l'énorme créature qui se terre dans les profondeurs de Zarkov. Il provoque la furie et embrume l'esprit.

languages.text: El aullido mental de la inmensa criatura alojada en las profundidades de Zarkov. Despierta la furia y nubla la mente.
languages.original_text: The mental shriek of the immense creature entrenched within Zarkov's depths. It awakens fury and clouds the mind.

traits.locale_text: El aullido mental de la inmensa criatura alojada en las profundidades de Zarkov. Despierta la furia y nubla la mente.

languages.text: Das metallene Kreischen der riesigen Kreatur in Zarkovs Tiefen. Es löst Angst aus und trübt den Verstand.
languages.original_text: The mental shriek of the immense creature entrenched within Zarkov's depths. It awakens fury and clouds the mind.

traits.locale_text: Das metallene Kreischen der riesigen Kreatur in Zarkovs Tiefen. Es löst Angst aus und trübt den Verstand.

languages.text: ザルコフの深部に巣食う、巨大な生物の精神的な叫び。それは憤怒を呼び覚まし、心を曇らせる。
languages.original_text: The mental shriek of the immense creature entrenched within Zarkov's depths. It awakens fury and clouds the mind.

traits.locale_text: ザルコフの深部に巣食う、巨大な生物の精神的な叫び。それは憤怒を呼び覚まし、心を曇らせる。
